title: Raid on Fest
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] mission|other [[Mission to Fest (disambiguation)|missions to Fest]]}} {{Mission |prev= |conc= |next=[[Skirmish at Dinlo]]''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' |image= |name=Raid on Fest |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |objective=Disable [[Separatist Phrik factory]] |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] ([[Great ReSynchronization|14:3]]) |place=[[Fest/Legends|Fest]] |result=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Phrik/Legends|phrik]] factory successfully destroyed |side1=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |side2=Confederacy of Independent Systems |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=[[Omega Squad]] |ppl2=[[Battle droid/Legends|Battle droids]] |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=None |casual2=Numerous [[Droid/Legends|droids]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I've got visual on the factory, and you're not going to like it.|Clone pilot|}} The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] undertook a '''raid on Fest''' against [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems']] [[Phrik/Legends|phrik]] refining [[Separatist Phrik factory|factory]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fest/Legends|Fest]]. A [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]] discovered the facility in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Great ReSynchronization|ten months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] started the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Omega Squad]], a [[Squad/Legends|group]] of four [[Clone commando/Legends|Republic commandos]] in new, [[Color/Legends|black]] "stealth" [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|armor]], was dispatched to the [[Water/Legends|snow]] planet and, fighting its way through [[Battle droid/Legends|droid]] defenders, destroyed the factory with no casualties; the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone]] [[Fi Skirata|RC-8015]] recorded the success in his journal. ==Prelude== {{Quote|So. How long ago did you put in a request for black stealth armor?''"
"''Seven standard months. When we got back from Qiilura.''"
"''And ''now'' they issue it to us? To do a raid on ''Fest''? The whole planet's covered in snow from pole to pole.|Commandos Fi and Darman|}} [[File:OmegaSquad.jpg|thumb|left|300px|The clone commandos of Omega Squad (pictured) were dispatched to carry out the raid against the Fest facility.]] In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], a single [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]—one of only a dozen such [[Clone trooper/Legends|troopers]] bred by [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] [[Cloning/Legends|cloners]] and utilized for the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Clone Intelligence/Legends|Clone Intelligence]]—discovered a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[Separatist Phrik factory|factory]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fest/Legends|Fest]], located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. In [[Great ReSynchronization|14:3]], ten [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which started the Clone Wars between the CIS and Republic, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] chose the [[Clone commando/Legends|commando unit]] [[Omega Squad]] to destroy the facility, despite having just issued them stealth [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando armor]]; while being extra tough, the armor was [[Color/Legends|colored]] black, making it inopportune for an arctic mission. Composed of four Republic clones, each the sole survivors of other, decimated squads, the unit was led by [[Niner Skirata|Niner]], RC-1309. Omega Squad's mission was to destroy the Separatist facility, which was developing a new supermetal known as [[Phrik/Legends|phrik]]. The mission was considered simple by the clones themselves: they planned to infiltrate the facility, lay charges in its processing plant and foundry, and then escape the plant before detonating the explosives. ==The mission== Beginning the raid, the four clones were dropped planetside in a [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]], in the lee of an outcrop overlooking the facility. After brief reconnaissance, Omega Squad commando [[Fi Skirata|Fi]], designated RC-8015, used a [[PLX-1/Legends|PLX-1 portable missile launcher]] to attack the droids, while his companions, [[Atin Skirata|Atin]] and [[Darman Skirata|Darman]]—designated RC-3222 and RC-1136, respectively—worked their way up to higher ground to infiltrate the factory. The clones continued with their mission, eventually completing it with no casualties. Fi later recorded the mission in his private journal. ==Aftermath== The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]—the post-Clone Wars successor to the Republic—later restarted phrik testing and refining on Fest as part of their [[Dark Trooper Project]]. Their [[Weapons Research Facility]] was [[Mission to Fest (Galactic Civil War)|infiltrated]] by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative named [[Kyle Katarn]],{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/kylekatarnstale3|series=Kyle Katarn's Tale|text=Mission 3}} and later [[Escape from Fest|destroyed]] by the Alliance's [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in a separate engagement.[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] ==Behind the scenes== The raid on Fest appeared in ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', a [[2006]] novel written by [[Karen Traviss]]. While not directly appearing in the novel, the beginnings of the incident were related as the private journal of RC-8015, included as the prologue of the novel. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Misión a Fest (Guerras Clon) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Fest (Clone Wars), mission to}} [[Category:Battles of Fest]] [[Category:Missions of the Clone Wars]]
